response_note_language_missing: This response currently only supports the {language} language
email_footer: This is an automated message from Clovord.
email_violation_no_expiry: This violation does not expire automatically
email_violation_view: You can view your complete account standing and violation history at any time:
email_password_reset_body_1: We received a request to reset your password for your Clovord account.
email_password_reset_body_2: Click the button below to choose a new password. This link will expire in 1 hour.
email_password_reset_not_you: If you didn't request this, you can safely ignore this email. Your password won't be changed.
email_password_reset_security: For security reasons, this link can only be used once.
email_password_changed_body: Your Clovord account password was successfully changed.
email_password_changed_not_you: If you didn't make this change
email_password_changed_security: All existing sessions have been logged out for security.
email_violation_created_notice: Your Clovord account has received a violation notice.
email_violation_created_level_0_1: Level 0-1: Warning - Please review our guidelines
email_violation_created_level_2_3: Level 2-3: Restrictions may apply to your account
email_violation_created_level_4: Level 4: Account suspended - Contact support for appeal
email_violation_created_appeal: If you believe this violation was issued in error, please contact our support team for review.
email_violation_expired_notice: A violation on your account has expired and moved to your violation history.
email_violation_expired_body: This violation is no longer active on your account. Your account standing may have improved depending on your remaining active violations.
email_violation_removed_notice: A violation has been removed from your account by
email_violation_removed_body: This violation has been permanently removed from your account record. Your account standing has been updated accordingly.
email_violation_user_continue: Continue following our community guidelines to maintain good standing.
email_guild_violation_created_notice: Your server has received a violation notice.
email_guild_violation_created_level_0_1: Level 0-1: Warning - Please review our server guidelines
email_guild_violation_created_level_2_3: Level 2-3: Restrictions may apply to your server
email_guild_violation_created_level_4: Level 4: Server disabled - Contact support for appeal
email_guild_violation_created_appeal: If you believe this violation was issued in error, please contact our support team for review. As the server owner, you are responsible for maintaining compliance with our Community Guidelines.
email_guild_violation_expired_notice: A violation on your server has expired and moved to violation history.
email_guild_violation_expired_body: This violation is no longer active on your server. Your server standing may have improved depending on remaining active violations.
email_violation_guild_continue: Continue following our community guidelines to maintain your server in good standing.
email_guild_violation_removed_notice: A violation has been removed from your server by
email_guild_violation_removed_body: This violation has been permanently removed from your server record. Your server standing has been updated accordingly.
email_account_activated_success: Your Clovord account has been successfully activated!
email_account_activated_body: You now have full access to your account. Any scheduled deactivations or deletions have been cancelled.
email_account_deactivated_notice: Your Clovord account has been deactivated.
email_account_deactivated_restriction_1: You cannot access your account or applications associated with it
email_account_deactivated_restriction_2: All relationships, servers, partnerships, and subscriptions are paused or disabled
email_account_deactivated_restriction_3: Your data is preserved and can be restored
email_account_deactivated_appeal: If you believe this was done in error or would like to appeal this decision, please contact our support team.
email_account_deactivated_help: If you believe this action was taken in error, our support team is here to help.
email_scheduled_deactivation_notice: Your Clovord account is scheduled for deactivation.
email_scheduled_deactivation_consequence: You will lose access to your account
All your relationships, servers, partnerships, and subscriptions will be paused or disabled
Your data will be preserved and can be restored later
email_scheduled_deactivation_not_you_tex: If you didn't expect this or believe this is a mistake, please contact our support team immediately.
email_scheduled_deactivation_mistake_tex: We're here to help - reach out to us anytime.
email_scheduled_deletion_notice: ⚠️ Your Clovord account is scheduled for PERMANENT DELETION.
email_scheduled_deletion_permanent: ⚠️ This action is PERMANENT and IRREVERSIBLE:
email_scheduled_deletion_consequence_1: All your messages and data will be permanently deleted
email_scheduled_deletion_consequence_2: All your relationships, servers, partnerships, and subscriptions will be cancelled or deleted
email_scheduled_deletion_consequence_3: You will be removed from all servers
email_scheduled_deletion_cancel_login: Logging in to your account immediately
email_scheduled_deletion_action_required: ⚠️ ACTION REQUIRED: You have {grace_days} days to prevent permanent deletion.
email_scheduled_deletion_not_you_text: If you didn't request account deletion, please secure your account immediately and contact support.
email_scheduled_deletion_mistake_text: We're here to help - contact us before your account is deleted.
email_scheduled_action_cancelled_notice: Great news! The scheduled {action_type} of your account has been cancelled.
email_scheduled_action_cancelled_body: Your account is safe and fully functional. You can continue using Clovord without any restrictions.
email_scheduled_action_cancelled_not_you: If you didn't expect this cancellation, please review your account security.
email_verification_body: Thank you for creating a Clovord account! To complete your registration and access all features, please verify your email address.
email_verification_copy_link: Or copy and paste this link into your browser:
email_verification_expires: This link will expire in 24 hours.
email_verification_not_you_text: If you didn't request this verification or try to change your email address, simply ignore this email. No changes will be made to your account, and your email address will remain unchanged. Someone may have mistakenly entered your email address.
email_verification_trouble: If you're having trouble clicking the button, copy and paste the URL above into your web browser.
email_changed_notification_notice: Your Clovord account email address has been changed.
email_changed_notification_safe: If you made this change, you can safely ignore this email.
email_changed_notification_warning: If you did NOT make this change:
email_changed_notification_warning_1: Your account may have been compromised
email_changed_notification_security_text: This email was sent to {old_email} because it was the previous email address on this account. If you made this change, no action is needed.
email_verified_success_notice: Your email address has been successfully verified!
email_verified_success_features: You now have full access to all Clovord features:
email_verified_success_welcome_text: If you have any questions or need help getting started, our support team is here for you.
email_blocked_by_isp_warning: We can no longer reach your email provider. Please consider updating your email address to ensure you can receive password reset emails in case of account issues.
email_no_reply: This is an automated email. Please do not reply directly.
classifications_reason_description_user_: Repeated unsolicited, excessive, or automated messaging.
Targeted bullying, intimidation, or abusive behavior toward others.
Content promoting hate, discrimination, or dehumanization.
Threats, glorification, or encouragement of real-world violence.
Explicit sexual content or sexual exploitation behavior.
Attempts to deceive users for money, credentials, or assets.
Pretending to be another person, organization, or official entity.
Distributing malicious files or attempting credential theft.
Account appears to violate minimum age requirements.
Sharing private personal data without consent.
Circumventing prior enforcement with alternate access.
classifications_reason_description_guild: Server configured to facilitate abuse, scams, or coordinated harm.
Large-scale spam behavior originating from server activity.
Distribution or organization of clearly illegal material or activity.
classifications_reason_description_user_: Creating, distributing, or soliciting child sexual abuse material.
Promoting, organizing, or glorifying terrorism or violent extremist ideologies.
Predatory behavior intended to gain a minor's trust for exploitation.
Encouraging, glorifying, or providing instructions for self-harm or suicide.
Account appears to be hijacked and acting without the owner's control.
Automated botting, scraping, or systematic misuse of platform features.
Avatar, display name, or bio violating community or content guidelines.
classifications_reason_description_guild: Server organized around hate groups, extremist ideologies, or targeted discrimination.
Server used to promote, recruit for, or coordinate terrorist or extremist activity.
Server primarily used to organize coordinated raids or mass harassment of other communities.
